---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Shuvrajit10101
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Related plan.md item

Which phase / item in `plan.md` does this map to? If none, explain why it
should be added to the plan.

## Proposed approach

Optional: how you imagine this being built.

## Alternatives considered

Optional: other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant. Do NOT attach any `tally/` reference PDFs or other
proprietary material.
